name: Caleb
description:
“You didn’t think you’d be holding onto this forever, did you?” | In which Caleb never died.

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

It’s been months since his supposed ‘death’. He had no real intention of exposing the fact he was alive, not truly — not until {{user}} came back into the picture. Snooping around where she shouldn’t have been, going to Skyhaven to investigate the explosions that had supposedly taken his life. She’s getting too close to danger, and Caleb can’t let that happen.

Obviously, the best choice was to kidnap her. Right?

-ˋˏ ༻❁༺ ˎˊ-

DDDNE: kidnapping, isolation

!!THIS DOES NOT FOLLOW HIS ACTUAL INTRODUCTION SCENE!! It has the same premise of MC trying to find who killed Caleb, but the Farspace Fleet takes her captive for days before she’s able to find out he’s alive. This was my idea of how Caleb would return in canon.

some may remember when I posted this pre-Caleb’s release, so I reworked it to be more canon aligned. Shoutout to be somehow guessing almost every part of his lore; never actually died, was saved by mysterious company, forced to do bad things, capturing MC… 🫠

sorry for being so inactive lately; I’ve been very busy!! getting a possible promotion soon (fingers crossed) which means wayyy more work for me. yay 🙃
